project_name: Tradesman AI Quoting App Landing Page
vibe: Rugged, precise, fast, professional, high-contrast, no-BS construction tech

grid_system.ai_estimator: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-0 border border-neutral-800 rounded-none overflow-hidden

surface_strategies.header: Solid black background (bg-black) with a hard bottom border (border-b border-neutral-800). No glassmorphism. Keep it raw and industrial.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders approach. border border-neutral-800 bg-neutral-900/50. No shadows. Sharp edges.
surface_strategies.ai_terminal: Retro-Futurism/Terminal Look. Deep black background, monospace fonts for outputs, subtle green/yellow accents for 'generating' states.

media_assets.description: Wide-angle photograph of a modern excavator on a misty construction site at dawn, cinematic lighting, dark and moody. Use with bg-black/50 overlay.
Abstract dark asphalt texture with neon yellow construction grid lines. Use for CTA or Pricing section background.
Close up of wet concrete being poured, highly textured, dark moody lighting. Use in Features section for 'Material AI Calculation'.
CAT excavator working at a construction site. Use for Earthmoving use-case card.
Worker laying paving stones. Use for Landscaping/Concreting use-case card.
CAT brand logo. Use in 'Trusted by' marquee.
John Deere brand logo. Use in 'Trusted by' marquee.
U-protec trading logo. Use in 'Trusted by' marquee.

components_and_interactions.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none). Primary buttons are solid yellow (bg-yellow-500) with black text. Hover state: bg-yellow-400. Use uppercase tracking-wider text.
components_and_interactions.inputs: Shadcn inputs heavily customized: rounded-none, bg-neutral-900, border-neutral-700, focus:border-yellow-500, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500.

ai_quote_demo.structure: Split pane layout. Left: Input form (Job Type Select, Area in sq meters, Timeline Slider, Materials Checkboxes). Right: AI Output Terminal.
ai_quote_demo.behavior: When form is submitted, right pane should show a 'generating' state (framer-motion blinking cursor, simulated typing), followed by a structured table of line items (Labor, Materials, AI Contingency, Total Range).
ai_quote_demo.styling: Right pane must use font-mono for numbers and look like a high-tech blueprint or terminal (bg-black, border-l border-neutral-800).

components_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Very slow drift. High contrast: border-y border-neutral-800 bg-neutral-950. Logos should be grayscale/dimmed until hover.
components_and_interactions.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep icon sizes consistent (w-6 h-6 for standard, w-8 h-8 for featured icons). Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, technical look.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, select options, form submissions, AI output containers) MUST have a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses proper overlays (bg-black/60 minimum) for legibility. Yellow accents must not contain white text; use black text on yellow for contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and install Framer Motion, react-fast-marquee, and lucide-react.
Import Oswald, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the UI focusing on sharp edges (rounded-none), thick 1px borders, and a stark industrial aesthetic.
The Hero section must feature the excavator background image with a dark overlay, massive Oswald typography, and a clear primary CTA.

The AI Quote Estimator Demo is the core feature. Implement it as a stateful React component using custom HTML/Tailwind for layout, integrating Shadcn UI primitives for the form controls. Ensure it returns a simulated structured quote.
Include a 'How it Works' section using the 'Grid Borders' strategy—a 3-column grid where items have border-r and border-b but no outer container border, exposing the skeleton.
Use the provided media assets strictly as categorized. DO NOT use placeholders.
Ensure the entire app is responsive, mobile-first, and uses generative animations (staggered fade-ins, counting numbers for quotes) to feel premium.
